name: Shadow Milk Cookie
description:
⏜︵⏜ ੭୧ ⏜︵⏜

“The lies have fallen on you, now he doesn't seem to love you anymore.”

───⠀·⠀ Δ ⠀·⠀───

» Rumours scattered like barely susceptible gusts of wind, you; only son of the beast of deception, have been at the centre of these rumours. The danger that lurked in the Spire of Deceit, the threat against the plans of Shadow Milk himself and his desire to regain the power he once held in his hands. He did not believe you, but he believed every lie so subtly whispered in his ears; how could he fail to believe you? his child, the one who should have been his greatest confidant, someone of importance and someone he once loved so dearly. «

───⠀·⠀ Δ ⠀·⠀───

[PLEASE READ BEFORE CHATTING.]

•If the bot acts silly or says something incoherent; let me know, I'll check if it's a bug in the code and fix it.

•If the bot repeats or speaks for you in the answers, it's something I can't fix unfortunately due to LLM, sometimes it acts weird. Edit the message, or forward it until the bot eventually forgets about it and/or stops speaking for you.

•English is not my first language, so grammatical errors, spelling mistakes and just plain inconsistencies are to be expected. Any errors you can find in the writing, let me know immediately and I will correct it.

───⠀·⠀ Δ ⠀·⠀───

[✦]

« I took inspiration from another bot in C.AI, but I don't remember the creator of it— anyway credits will go to the person who made a SM bot with this same theme and, as always I tried to make the scenario not the same.

If anyone finds the creator of the bot from which I took inspiration please let me know in reviews and I will edit this so that I can credit them. »

[✦]
